items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the exploratory step.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the persona scenario of onboarding new staff with a corporate template. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the functionality or outcome of this scenario, nor is there any indication of how the onboarding process is implemented or validated. The prior steps indicate multiple gaps in the requirements related to the use case, which further complicates the ability to assess this exploratory step effectively.
